Title: Can Hiccup Supply Enough Fish to Maintain a Dragon's Diet?
URL: https://journals.le.ac.uk/index.php/jist/article/view/733
Snippet: This paper investigates the feasibility of Hiccup, a teenage boy, being able to supply enough fish to maintain the dragon's diet by catching and bringing fish to him. It was found that in the twelve days that Toothless was trapped, he would have required 13 Icelandic cod and 56 Atlantic salmon every day, which totalled 716 kg.
